items.name: Environment
items.example: We must protect our environment.

items.name: Nature
items.example: She loves spending time in nature.

items.name: Ecosystem
items.example: The forest is a rich ecosystem.

items.name: Biodiversity
items.example: This region has rich biodiversity.
items.exampleTamil: இந்த பகுதியில் வளமான பல்லுயிர் பெருக்கம் உள்ளது.

items.name: Habitat
items.example: The forest is the tiger's habitat.

items.name: Wildlife
items.example: They protect wildlife in the reserve.

items.name: Forest
items.example: The forest is home to many animals.

items.name: Rainforest
items.example: The Amazon is the largest rainforest.

items.name: Grassland
items.example: Zebras graze on the grassland.

items.name: Wetland
items.example: The wetland supports many bird species.

items.name: Desert
items.example: Camels are common in the desert.

items.name: Mountain
items.example: They climbed the tall mountain.

items.name: Valley
items.example: The village lies in a green valley.

items.name: River
items.example: The river flows through the city.

items.name: Lake
items.example: They went boating on the lake.

items.name: Ocean
items.example: The ocean covers most of the earth.

items.name: Sea
items.example: They swam in the sea.

items.name: Waterfall
items.example: The waterfall is a popular tourist spot.
items.exampleTamil: அருவி ஒரு பிரபலமான சுற்றுலா தலம் ஆகும்.

items.name: Island
items.example: They vacationed on a tropical island.
items.exampleTamil: அவர்கள் ஒரு வெப்பமண்டல தீவில் விடுமுறை எடுத்தனர்.

items.name: Climate
items.example: Climate change affects the whole world.

items.name: Weather
items.example: The weather is pleasant today.

items.name: Atmosphere
items.example: The atmosphere protects earth from radiation.

items.name: Air
items.example: We need clean air to breathe.

items.name: Oxygen
items.example: Trees release oxygen into the air.

items.name: Carbon Dioxide
items.example: Cars emit carbon dioxide.

items.name: Greenhouse Gas
items.example: Greenhouse gases trap heat in the atmosphere.
items.exampleTamil: பசுமை இல்ல வாயுக்கள் வளிமண்டலத்தில் வெப்பத்தை சிக்கவைக்கின்றன.

items.name: Global Warming
items.example: Global warming is melting the glaciers.

items.name: Climate Change
items.example: Climate change affects weather patterns.

items.name: Ozone Layer
items.example: The ozone layer blocks harmful UV rays.
items.exampleTamil: ஓசோன் படை தீங்கு விளைவிக்கும் புற ஊதா கதிர்களை தடுக்கிறது.

items.name: Pollution
items.example: Pollution harms both humans and animals.

items.name: Air Pollution
items.example: Air pollution causes breathing problems.

items.name: Water Pollution
items.example: Water pollution kills aquatic life.

items.name: Soil Pollution
items.example: Soil pollution reduces crop yield.

items.name: Noise Pollution
items.example: Noise pollution disturbs city residents.
items.exampleTamil: ஒலி மாசுபாடு நகர வாசிகளை தொந்தரவு செய்கிறது.

items.name: Plastic Pollution
items.example: Plastic pollution harms marine animals.
items.exampleTamil: பிளாஸ்டிக் மாசுபாடு கடல் வாழ் விலங்குகளை பாதிக்கிறது.

items.name: Waste
items.example: Reduce waste to protect the environment.

items.name: Garbage
items.example: Throw the garbage in the bin.

items.name: Litter
items.example: Do not litter on the streets.

items.name: Landfill
items.example: The landfill is full of plastic waste.

items.name: Recycling
items.example: Recycling reduces waste in landfills.

items.name: Reuse
items.example: Reuse bags instead of buying new ones.

items.name: Reduce
items.example: Reduce plastic use to help the planet.

items.name: Compost
items.example: They make compost from kitchen waste.
items.exampleTamil: அவர்கள் சமையலறை கழிவில் இருந்து உரம் தயாரிக்கின்றனர்.

items.name: Renewable Energy
items.example: Renewable energy reduces pollution.

items.name: Solar Energy
items.example: Solar energy is clean and renewable.

items.name: Wind Energy
items.example: Wind energy powers many homes.

items.name: Hydroelectric Energy
items.example: Hydroelectric energy uses flowing water.

items.name: Geothermal Energy
items.example: Geothermal energy comes from the earth's heat.
items.exampleTamil: புவிவெப்ப ஆற்றல் பூமியின் வெப்பத்தில் இருந்து வருகிறது.

items.name: Biomass
items.example: Biomass energy comes from organic material.
items.exampleTamil: உயிர்த்திணிவு ஆற்றல் கரிமப் பொருளில் இருந்து வருகிறது.

items.name: Fossil Fuel
items.example: Fossil fuels contribute to pollution.

items.name: Coal
items.example: Coal is burned to produce electricity.

items.name: Petroleum
items.example: Petroleum is used to make fuel.

items.name: Natural Gas
items.example: Natural gas is used for cooking.

items.name: Conservation
items.example: Water conservation is important in summer.

items.name: Preservation
items.example: Preservation of forests is essential.

items.name: Sustainability
items.example: Sustainability ensures resources for the future.

items.name: Green Living
items.example: They follow a green living lifestyle.
items.exampleTamil: அவர்கள் ஒரு பசுமை வாழ்க்கை முறையை பின்பற்றுகின்றனர்.

items.name: Eco-Friendly
items.example: She uses eco-friendly products.

items.name: Carbon Footprint
items.example: Reduce your carbon footprint by walking more.
items.exampleTamil: அதிகம் நடப்பதன் மூலம் உங்கள் கார்பன் தடத்தை குறைக்கவும்.

items.name: Tree
items.example: They planted a tree in the garden.

items.name: Plant
items.example: Water the plant every day.

items.name: Flower
items.example: The flower bloomed beautifully.

items.name: Seed
items.example: She planted the seed in the soil.

items.name: Soil
items.example: Fertile soil grows healthy crops.

items.name: Fertilizer
items.example: He used fertilizer for better growth.

items.name: Organic Farming
items.example: Organic farming avoids chemical pesticides.

items.name: Deforestation
items.example: Deforestation destroys animal habitats.

items.name: Afforestation
items.example: Afforestation helps restore green cover.
items.exampleTamil: காடு வளர்ப்பு பசுமை மூடியை மீட்டெடுக்க உதவுகிறது.

items.name: Reforestation
items.example: Reforestation projects plant new trees.

items.name: Endangered Species
items.example: Tigers are an endangered species.

items.name: Extinction
items.example: Many species face extinction today.

items.name: Conservation Area
items.example: This forest is a protected conservation area.
items.exampleTamil: இந்த காடு ஒரு பாதுகாக்கப்பட்ட பாதுகாப்பு பகுதி ஆகும்.

items.name: National Park
items.example: They visited the national park last month.
items.exampleTamil: அவர்கள் கடந்த மாதம் தேசிய பூங்காவிற்கு சென்றனர்.

items.name: Wildlife Sanctuary
items.example: The wildlife sanctuary protects rare animals.

items.name: Marine Life
items.example: Marine life thrives in coral reefs.

items.name: Coral Reef
items.example: The coral reef is full of colorful fish.

items.name: Drought
items.example: The region suffered a severe drought.

items.name: Flood
items.example: The flood damaged many homes.

items.name: Cyclone
items.example: The cyclone hit the coastal region.

items.name: Hurricane
items.example: The hurricane caused massive destruction.

items.name: Tornado
items.example: The tornado destroyed several buildings.

items.name: Earthquake
items.example: The earthquake damaged many buildings.

items.name: Volcano
items.example: The volcano erupted suddenly.

items.name: Tsunami
items.example: The tsunami hit the coastal area.

items.name: Rain
items.example: The rain cooled the hot weather.

items.name: Snow
items.example: The mountains are covered with snow.

items.name: Sunlight
items.example: Plants need sunlight to grow.

items.name: Temperature
items.example: Check the temperature before going out.

items.name: Humidity
items.example: The humidity is high in the coastal city.

items.name: Wind
items.example: The wind blew the leaves away.

items.name: Water Cycle
items.example: The water cycle includes evaporation and rain.
items.exampleTamil: நீர் சுழற்சியில் ஆவியாதல் மற்றும் மழை அடங்கும்.

items.name: Food Chain
items.example: Every animal is part of a food chain.
items.exampleTamil: ஒவ்வொரு விலங்கும் ஒரு உணவுச் சங்கிலியின் பகுதியாகும்.

items.name: Food Web
items.example: The food web shows many food chains connected.
items.exampleTamil: உணவு வலை பல உணவுச் சங்கிலிகள் இணைந்திருப்பதை காட்டுகிறது.

items.name: Natural Resource
items.example: Water is a precious natural resource.
items.exampleTamil: நீர் ஒரு விலைமதிப்பற்ற இயற்கை வளம் ஆகும்.

items.name: Environmental Protection
items.example: Environmental protection is everyone's responsibility.

items.name: Greenhouse Effect
items.example: The greenhouse effect warms the earth.

items.name: Sustainable Development
items.example: Sustainable development balances growth and environment.

items.name: Earth Day
items.example: Earth Day is celebrated every April.

items.name: Zero Waste
items.example: She follows a zero waste lifestyle.
items.exampleTamil: அவள் ஒரு பூஜ்ஜிய கழிவு வாழ்க்கை முறையை பின்பற்றுகிறாள்.
